# Tech Tiger BD (TigerBD)

> Tech Tiger BD (ttigerbd.com) is a Bangladesh-based seller of genuine premium digital subscriptions and game top-ups at affordable local prices. Customers pay in BDT with bKash, Nagad, Rocket, or Binance, and most orders are delivered within 1–5 minutes after payment verification. 850+ verified 5★ reviews with a replacement-first refund policy.

## About

- [Home](https://ttigerbd.com/): Overview of all subscriptions and game top-ups available in Bangladesh.
- [Is Tech Tiger BD Legit?](https://ttigerbd.com/legit/): Proof of legitimacy, verified reviews, and the refund/replacement policy.

## AI tools

- [ChatGPT Plus Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/chatgpt/): Shared and Personal ChatGPT Plus plans from ৳350.
- [Claude Pro Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/claude-pro/): Claude Pro Personal plan.
- [Google AI Pro (Gemini, Veo 3)](https://ttigerbd.com/products/gemini/): Google AI Pro with Gemini, Flow, and storage from ৳450/month.
- [Grok / SuperGrok Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/grok/): SuperGrok with Grok 4, voice, and image from ৳1500/month.
- [Perplexity AI Pro Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/perplexity/): Perplexity Pro plans.
- [Grammarly Premium Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/grammarly/): Grammarly Premium subscription.
- [QuillBot Premium Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/quillbot/): Paraphraser and plagiarism checker from ৳200/month.
- [StealthWriter Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/stealthwriter/): AI humanizer, AI detector, and generator.

- [Netflix Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/netflix/): Netflix Personal plans.

- [Crunchyroll Premium Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/crunchyroll/): Crunchyroll Premium (MegaFan) anime streaming — Shared from ৳50, Personal from ৳100.

## VPN, messaging & games

- [Surfshark VPN Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/surfshark/): Surfshark VPN subscription.
- [Telegram Premium Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/telegram-premium/): Telegram Premium subscription.
- [Free Fire UC Top-Up Bangladesh](https://ttigerbd.com/products/free-fire/): Free Fire diamond/UC top-ups by player UID.

## Contact & payment

- Payment methods: bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Binance (prices in Bangladeshi Taka, BDT).
- Delivery: usually 1–5 minutes after payment verification.
- Support and order confirmation via WhatsApp.
